channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Elon Musk is becoming a liability for his own businesses
item.description: SpaceX just pulled off an audacious, successful launch of its Starship rocket booster. The event, which occurred Sunday, is a massive moment for Elon Musk’s space exploration firm, and could kick-start the next phase of the space revolution.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: What in the world is going on at Ubisoft?
item.description: Ubisoft is no stranger to takeover whispers. In 2004, Electronic Arts made a run at the video game publisher, but was ultimately rebuffed. In 2015, Vivendi made an even more serious attempt that took years to defuse.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Adobe lets customers test Firefly AI video generator
item.description: Adobe’s AI model for video generation is now available in a limited beta, enabling users to create short video clips from text and image prompts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Windows users are being tricked by sneaky malware scheme
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how security experts found new malware, Lumma Stealer, spreading via fake verification pages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aquona digitaliza sus operaciones en Castilla y León mediante la herramienta DROP
item.description: En el marco del proceso de transformación digital que está ejecutando Aquona, empresa responsable de la gestión del agua en más de 60 municipios de Castilla y León, se ha procedido a digitalizar la totalidad de sus operaciones dando un paso adelante en la mejora de la planificación de los trabajos y
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: SpaceX catches Starship rocket booster on Texas launchpad
item.description: SpaceX caught a rocket booster on its Texas launchpad as it returned to Earth on Sunday. The chopstick-like arms of the tower, called Mechazilla, grabbed the descending 232-foot booster after a seven-minute flight.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: BAKERSVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina's mountains, the constant din of a gas-powered generator is getting to be too much for Bobby Renfro.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA AOUN ANGUEIRA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Over 77,000 customers' personal information is exposed in Fidelity Investments data breach
item.description: Fidelity Investments, one of the world's biggest asset managers, experienced a data breach in August, the company's second in 12 months.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google monopoly: Prosecutors hint at company breakup, but analysts say it’s unlikely
item.description: The case was filed in 2020, heralding a new U.S. government legal effort to rein in tech giants, with anti-monopoly cases against Amazon, Apple, and Facebook and Instagram parent firm Meta.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Will your AI bot put citizens at risk?
item.description: Government agencies have an obligation to provide accurate information to citizens, and a bad bot can have both legal and moral implications. The post Will your AI bot put citizens at risk? first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft’s Patch Tuesday updates: Keeping up with the latest fixes
item.description: Long before Taco Tuesday became part of the pop-culture vernacular, Tuesdays were synonymous with security — and for anyone in the tech world, they still are.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The IRS is rolling out its free tax-filing tool to 30 million Americans—and surprisingly, it’s great
item.description: Some 30 million Americans across the country will have a new way to file their taxes next spring: Direct File, a tool developed by the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) that allows users to prepare their taxes and file online completely free of charge and without the need for any third-party provider.
item.dc:creator: Bryce Covert, Fast Company

item.title: How Google used influence, ultimatum to cut controversial deal on California news
item.description: Google insisted on taxpayer money as part of the deal with California to help set a precedent for potential talks about payments to the news industry in other states, according to the people familiar with the talks.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Climate change gave significant boost to Milton's destructive rain, winds, scientists say
item.description: Scientists say human-caused climate change intensified deadly Hurricane Milton’s rainfall by 20 to 30% and strengthened its winds by about 10%.
item.dc:creator: Alexa St. John, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 18 Android settings that’ll strengthen your security
item.description: You might not know it from all the panic-inducing headlines out there, but Android is actually packed with practical and powerful security options.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
